targets.queryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Total Attributed Cost"
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.topic_name AS "Topic",
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Cost"
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.topic_name
ORDER BY "Cost" DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  date(f.timestamp) AS day,
  d.product_type AS product_type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY day, d.product_type
ORDER BY day, cost DESC

targets.queryText:
WITH top_envs AS (
  SELECT d.env_id, SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS env_total
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f
  JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
  WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
    AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
    AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
    AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
  GROUP BY d.env_id
  ORDER BY env_total DESC
  LIMIT 10
),
top_topics AS (
  SELECT d.topic_name
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f
  JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
  WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
    AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
    AND d.topic_name != ''
    AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
    AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
  GROUP BY d.topic_name
  ORDER BY SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN d.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE d.env_id END AS environment,
  CASE WHEN d.topic_name IN (SELECT topic_name FROM top_topics) THEN d.topic_name ELSE 'Other' END AS topic,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.env_id IN (SELECT env_id FROM top_envs)
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY environment, topic
ORDER BY (SELECT env_total FROM top_envs te WHERE te.env_id = d.env_id) ASC, cost DESC

WITH top_envs AS (
  SELECT d.env_id, SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS env_total
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f

top_topics AS (

                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN d.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE d.env_id END AS environment,
  CASE WHEN d.topic_name IN (SELECT topic_name FROM top_topics) THEN d.topic_name ELSE 'Other' END AS topic,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.env_id IN (SELECT env_id FROM top_envs)
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY environment, topic
ORDER BY (SELECT env_total FROM top_envs te WHERE te.env_id = d.env_id) ASC, cost DESC

targets.queryText:
WITH top_clusters AS (
  SELECT d.cluster_resource_id, SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cluster_total
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f
  JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
  WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
    AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
    AND d.cluster_resource_id != ''
    AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
    AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
  GROUP BY d.cluster_resource_id
  ORDER BY cluster_total DESC
  LIMIT 10
),
top_topics AS (
  SELECT d.topic_name
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f
  JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
  WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
    AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
    AND d.topic_name != ''
    AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
    AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
  GROUP BY d.topic_name
  ORDER BY SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  d.cluster_resource_id AS cluster,
  CASE WHEN d.topic_name IN (SELECT topic_name FROM top_topics) THEN d.topic_name ELSE 'Other' END AS topic,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.cluster_resource_id IN (SELECT cluster_resource_id FROM top_clusters)
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY cluster, topic
ORDER BY (SELECT cluster_total FROM top_clusters tc WHERE tc.cluster_resource_id = d.cluster_resource_id) ASC, cost DESC

WITH top_clusters AS (
  SELECT d.cluster_resource_id, SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cluster_total
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  cluster_resource_id AS metric,
  ROUND(CAST(max_topic_cost AS REAL) / CAST(total_cost AS REAL) * 100, 1) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    cluster_resource_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT topic_name) AS num_topics,
    SUM(topic_cost) AS total_cost,
    MAX(topic_cost) AS max_topic_cost
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.cluster_resource_id,
      d.topic_name,
      SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS topic_cost
    FROM topic_attribution_facts f
    JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
    WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
      AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
      AND d.cluster_resource_id != ''
      AND d.topic_name != ''
      AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
      AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
      AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
      AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                          AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    GROUP BY d.cluster_resource_id, d.topic_name
  )
  GROUP BY cluster_resource_id
  HAVING total_cost > 0 AND num_topics > 1
)
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  cluster_resource_id AS metric,
  ROUND(CAST(max_topic_cost AS REAL) / CAST(total_cost AS REAL) * 100, 1) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    cluster_resource_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT topic_name) AS num_topics,
    SUM(topic_cost) AS total_cost,
    MAX(topic_cost) AS max_topic_cost
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.cluster_resource_id,
      d.topic_name,
      SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS topic_cost
    FROM topic_attribution_facts f
    JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
    WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
      AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
      AND d.cluster_resource_id != ''
      AND d.topic_name != ''
      AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
      AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
      AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
      AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                          AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    GROUP BY d.cluster_resource_id, d.topic_name
  )
  GROUP BY cluster_resource_id
  HAVING total_cost > 0 AND num_topics > 1
)
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Cluster Concentration Risk
panels.description: Percentage of cluster cost concentrated in a single topic (clusters with 2+ topics only). Green <50%, Yellow 50-75%, Red >=75%.

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  date(f.timestamp) AS day,
  d.product_type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY day, d.product_type
ORDER BY day

panels.title: Product Type Mix Over Time
panels.description: Normalized 100% stacked area showing the relative proportion of each product type over time.

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.product_type AS type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.product_type
ORDER BY value DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  d.product_type AS type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_type != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.product_type
ORDER BY value DESC

targets.queryText:
WITH top_topics AS (
  SELECT d.topic_name
  FROM topic_attribution_facts f
  JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
  WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
    AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
    AND d.topic_name != ''
    AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
    AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
    AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                        AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
  GROUP BY d.topic_name
  ORDER BY SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  date(f.timestamp) AS day,
  CASE WHEN d.topic_name IN (SELECT topic_name FROM top_topics) THEN d.topic_name ELSE 'Other' END AS topic,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY day, topic
ORDER BY day

SELECT

  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY day, topic
ORDER BY day

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.topic_name) AS "Active Topics"
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.topic_name) AS "Active Topics"
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    CAST(attributed AS REAL) / CASE WHEN total_kafka = 0 THEN 1 ELSE total_kafka END * 100, 1
  ) AS "Attribution Coverage %"
FROM (
  SELECT
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL))
     FROM topic_attribution_facts f
     JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
     WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
       AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
       AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                           AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    ) AS attributed,
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL))
     FROM chargeback_facts f
     JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
     WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
       AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
       AND d.product_category = 'KAFKA'
       AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                           AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    ) AS total_kafka
)
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  ROUND(
    CAST(attributed AS REAL) / CASE WHEN total_kafka = 0 THEN 1 ELSE total_kafka END * 100, 1
  ) AS "Attribution Coverage %"
FROM (
  SELECT
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL))
     FROM topic_attribution_facts f
     JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
     WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
       AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
       AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                           AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    ) AS attributed,
    (SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL))
     FROM chargeback_facts f
     JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
     WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
       AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
       AND d.product_category = 'KAFKA'
       AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                           AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
    ) AS total_kafka
)

panels.title: Attribution Coverage
panels.description: Percentage of total Kafka chargeback cost that has been attributed to specific topics.

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Total Kafka"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.product_category = 'KAFKA'
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Attributed vs Total Kafka Cost
panels.description: Compares total Kafka chargeback cost with cost attributed to specific topics. The gap represents unattributed cost.

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.topic_name,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS total_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Write%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS write_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS read_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Storage%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS storage_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Write%'
           AND d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Read%'
           AND d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Storage%'
       THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS other_cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.topic_name
ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  d.topic_name,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS total_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Write%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS write_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS read_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Storage%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS storage_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Write%'
           AND d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Read%'
           AND d.product_type NOT LIKE '%Storage%'
       THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS other_cost
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${product_type}' = '$__all' OR d.product_type IN (${product_type:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.topic_name
ORDER BY total_cost DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  d.topic_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Storage%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS storage_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS network_read,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Write%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS network_write,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' OR d.product_type LIKE '%Write%'
       THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_network
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.topic_name
HAVING storage_cost > 0
   AND total_network < 0.01
ORDER BY storage_cost DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  d.topic_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Storage%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS storage_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS network_read,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Write%' THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS network_write,
  SUM(CASE WHEN d.product_type LIKE '%Read%' OR d.product_type LIKE '%Write%'
       THEN CAST(f.amount AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_network
FROM topic_attribution_facts f
JOIN topic_attribution_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND d.topic_name != ''
  AND ('${cluster}' = '$__all' OR d.cluster_resource_id IN (${cluster:sqlstring}))
  AND ('${topic}' = '$__all' OR d.topic_name IN (${topic:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.topic_name
HAVING storage_cost > 0
   AND total_network < 0.01
ORDER BY storage_cost DESC

panels.title: Zombie Topics (High Storage, Low Network)
panels.description: Topics with storage cost > $0 but total network (read + write) cost < $0.01. These may be candidates for cleanup.
